description: [ELON] Create centralized Clerk auth middleware with RBAC helper functions. Export requireAuth() for all protected routes, requireRole(['Owner', 'Admin']) for admin-only routes, and requirePermission('permission_name') for granular checks. Include proper error responses with 401/403 status codes.
successCriteria: Middleware exports requireAuth, requireRole, requirePermission functions
TypeScript types for all 30+ permissions defined
Error responses include proper HTTP status codes and structured JSON
Clerk userId attached to req.auth object for downstream use
